lines.hearsay: There was comparing of notes at {place}, and no hurry about it.
lines.gossip: {A} keeps the paper and {B} keeps the road, so the two of them squared the day up between them at {place} — and where the two accounts disagreed, {B}'s is the one the village will be repeating by supper.
lines.report: {A} and {B} reconciled the day's accounts at {place}, slot {slot}.
